description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the leather strips and stitch detailing. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with dresses, and jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather uppers covering the forefoot and midfootStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementSynthetic leather heel cup with cut outs on the sides for added structureElasticated loop from the heel cup to the midfoot straps for snug FitCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
